name: Hashicorp Vault PAM Provider
description: The Hashicorp Vault PAM Provider allows for the retrieval of stored account credentials from a Hashicorp Vault Secret store. A valid token with access to the secrets in the Vault is used to retrieve secrets from a specific secret path in the Vault.

Parameters.Name: Host
Parameters.Description: The IP address or URL of the Vault instance, including any port number

Parameters.Name: Token
Parameters.Description: The access token for the Vault. For token auth only. Not needed for Kerberos auth.

Parameters.Name: Path
Parameters.Description: The path to secrets in the Vault. By default this would be at 'v1/secret/data'. The full form of this paramater is 'v1/{namespace}/{kv secrets engine name}/data'.

Parameters.Name: Secret
Parameters.Description: The name of the secret in the Vault

Parameters.Name: Key
Parameters.Description: The key to the key-value pair of the secret to access
